ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.subtitle: AI-powered recommendations to reduce emissions and improve sustainability.
ai_insights.priority_actions_subtitle: Top recommended actions and expected annual savings
ai_insights.action_1_desc: Upgrade heating, cooling and air conditioning systems with latest technology to reduce energy consumption.
ai_insights.action_2_desc: Replace conventional lighting with LED to reduce electricity bills and carbon emissions.
ai_insights.action_3_desc: Implement an effective recycling program across all offices to reduce waste.
ai_insights.action_4_desc: Use algorithms to optimize shipping and transportation routes.
ai_insights.risk_1_desc: Environmental regulations may lead to rising carbon permit prices.
ai_insights.risk_2_desc: Insufficient emissions data may not meet compliance and reporting requirements.
ai_insights.risk_3_desc: Climate change may affect physical supply chains and increase costs.
ai_insights.opp_1_desc: Transition to renewable energy sources to reduce operational emissions.
ai_insights.opp_2_desc: Collaborate with suppliers who follow sustainable practices.
ai_insights.opp_3_desc: Improve brand image and attract environmentally conscious investors.
